curation.synopsis: Plucked out of the ice by a slippery rogue trader, Zelia Lor, Talen, Mekki and Fleapit reach Hinterland, a bustling and chaotic spaceport at the edge of Imperial space. Aliens of every shape brush shoulders with grubby human traders, and almost nothing on offer is quite what it claims to be. Among the throng moves Captain Harleen Amity, a sharp-tongued pirate with a tragic past, who reluctantly takes the children under her wing. They are still chasing the same scrambled signal as before, a route to the Emperor's Seat and, with luck, Zelia's missing mother, but Hinterland is a place where information is currency, suspicion is sensible, and the secrets of the Tau turn out to be far more dangerous than anyone in their little crew can yet imagine.
